violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Food utility carts near dish area, reach in freezer, and reach in prep table cooler on cook line need cleaning. Area around fryers and char grill have grease/debris build up and need cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Close box of single use forks in storage area. Invert clam shell to-go food containers in storage are and near dessert cooler.
